title: ctenitis sagenioides
intro: Ctenitis sagenioides, also known as the Sagenioid fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which can help to reduce pain, fever, and swelling. The health benefits of Ctenitis sagenioides include its ability to treat various ailments such as respiratory issues, skin problems, and gastrointestinal disorders. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in teas, infusions, or decoctions, and can also be made into extracts or tinctures for topical application or oral consumption.
